title: Salary Data Point
description: Schema for individual salary data points from crowdsourced and published compensation sources.

job_title.description: Job title or role this salary corresponds to. Commonly found in: salary entry title field, compensation data row, salary report header.

company_name.description: Name of the employer. Commonly found in: company field in salary entry, employer name in report, data submission form.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the employer. Commonly found in: company profile link, employer website field.

company_size_range.description: Company size range (e.g., '51-200', '1000+'). Commonly found in: company size field, employer details, filter sidebar.

industry.description: Industry sector of the employer. Commonly found in: industry field, company profile, salary filter.

location_city.description: City of the job location. Commonly found in: location field, city in salary entry, geographic filter.

location_state.description: State or province of the job location. Commonly found in: location field, state in salary entry, geographic filter.

location_country.description: Country of the job location. Commonly found in: location field, country in salary entry, geographic filter.

remote.description: Whether the position is fully remote. Commonly found in: remote indicator, work arrangement field, location type.

total_comp_usd.description: Total annual compensation in USD. Commonly found in: total comp field, TC display, compensation summary.

base_salary_usd.description: Annual base salary in USD. Commonly found in: base salary field, salary breakdown section, compensation table.

bonus_usd.description: Annual bonus amount in USD. Commonly found in: bonus field, salary breakdown section, compensation table.

equity_usd.description: Annual equity value in USD. Commonly found in: equity field, stock/RSU value, compensation table.

signing_bonus_usd.description: Signing bonus amount in USD. Commonly found in: signing bonus field, compensation table, salary breakdown.

years_experience.description: Total years of professional experience. Commonly found in: experience field, years of experience input, salary filter.

years_at_company.description: Years at the current company. Commonly found in: tenure field, years at company input, compensation details.

education_level.description: Highest education level (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD). Commonly found in: education field, degree level input, salary filter.

seniority_level.description: Seniority or career level (e.g., Senior, Staff, Principal). Commonly found in: level field, seniority input, title level indicator.

data_source.description: Source or platform of this salary data point. Commonly found in: site domain, platform attribution, data source label.

submission_date.description: Date this salary was submitted or reported. Commonly found in: submission date field, report date, salary entry timestamp.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
